# Zigbee REST (homai)

> A local-first, privacy-focused smart home control system written in Go. Controls Zigbee devices directly via EZSP serial protocol through a REST API and CLI without cloud dependencies or MQTT brokers. Features device discovery via SSE, multi-profile support, JSON schema-validated device state, and cross-platform binaries.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/homai/blob/main/README.md): Installation, usage, and examples
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/homai/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture, CLI reference, and API endpoints

## API / Key Files

- [cmd/api/main.go](https://github.com/urmzd/homai/blob/main/cmd/api/main.go): API server entry point
- [cmd/cli/main.go](https://github.com/urmzd/homai/blob/main/cmd/cli/main.go): CLI entry point
- [pkg/api/router.go](https://github.com/urmzd/homai/blob/main/pkg/api/router.go): Gin HTTP router and endpoint definitions
- [pkg/zigbee/ezsp.go](https://github.com/urmzd/homai/blob/main/pkg/zigbee/ezsp.go): EZSP serial protocol layer
- [pkg/device/controller.go](https://github.com/urmzd/homai/blob/main/pkg/device/controller.go): Device abstraction layer
- [pkg/db/db.go](https://github.com/urmzd/homai/blob/main/pkg/db/db.go): SQLite persistence

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/homai/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
